title: gymnocalycium quehlianum
intro: Gymnocalycium quehlianum, also known as the Quehl's ball cactus, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, characterized by its spherical stems and short spines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gymnocalycium quehlianum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and powdering the stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical creams.
